item.title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:title: RosarioSIS [Education Apps]
item.itunes:author: francoisj
item.itunes:summary:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.description:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
RosarioSIS
(Education Apps)
RosarioSIS is a Student Information System designed for school management and communication.
It runs in the browser as a web application powered by PHP/SQL.
Main modules are: School, Students, Users, Scheduling, Grades, Attendance, Discipline, Food Service and Student Billing.
Numerous add-ons (modules, plugins and themes) are available. For example: Email, SMS, Messaging, Library, Hostel, Inventory, Students Import...
RosarioSIS features a responsive interface, multilingual support, PDF reports, list export to Excel, colorful statistical charts, online student registration.
A demo is available on the official website.
[read more]

item.title: Harmony Music [Audio Apps]
item.itunes:title: Harmony Music [Audio Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Harmony Music
(Audio Apps)
A cross platform App for streaming Music.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: Cherry Studio [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cherry Studio [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
Cherry Studio
(Utilities)
Cherry Studio is a desktop client that supports for multiple LLM providers, available on Windows, Mac and Linux.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
Cherry Studio
(Utilities)
Cherry Studio is a desktop client that supports for multiple LLM providers, available on Windows, Mac and Linux.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.

(Utilities)
Cherry Studio is a desktop client that supports for multiple LLM providers, available on Windows, Mac and Linux.

item.title: ClownMapEd [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:title: ClownMapEd [Jump N Run]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
ClownMapEd
(Jump N Run)
This is a sprite editor for the Mega Drive Sonic the Hedgehog games. It is a clone of Xenowhirl's SonMapEd and is made with the Qt framework.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.description:
ClownMapEd
(Jump N Run)
This is a sprite editor for the Mega Drive Sonic the Hedgehog games. It is a clone of Xenowhirl's SonMapEd and is made with the Qt framework.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
ClownMapEd
(Jump N Run)
This is a sprite editor for the Mega Drive Sonic the Hedgehog games. It is a clone of Xenowhirl's SonMapEd and is made with the Qt framework.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: ChemCanvas [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:title: ChemCanvas [Graphic Apps]
item.itunes:author: hb882
item.itunes:summary:
ChemCanvas
(Graphic Apps)
The most intuitive opensource 2D chemical drawing tool.
NOTE: This is only to provide appimages, I am not the developer.
[read more]

item.title: RecordMydesktop GUI [Screen Recorders]
item.itunes:title: RecordMydesktop GUI [Screen Recorders]
item.itunes:author: Upgreyed
item.itunes:summary:
RecordMydesktop GUI
(Screen Recorders)
A graphical frontend for recordmydesktop.
Works with most X11 desktop environments.
Does not work with Wayland.

[read more]
item.description:
RecordMydesktop GUI
(Screen Recorders)
A graphical frontend for recordmydesktop.
Works with most X11 desktop environments.
Does not work with Wayland.

[read more]
